topic: ACL main Method page-3 stack-entry clause polish

visible_issue: page 3 line 207: Gate 4 is the embodied-stack entry check.
baseline.reader_effect: Method retained the older embodied-stack compound after the paper had converged on stack-entry and stack-check terminology.

change.accepted_summary: Changed the Method Gate 4 opener to a stack-entry clause tied to the KuJiaLe route.
change.before: Gate 4 is the embodied-stack entry check. The official KuJiaLe route supplies matched original/noMDL scenes for InternNav and DualVLN.
change.after: Gate 4 checks stack entry through the KuJiaLe route, which supplies matched original/noMDL scenes for InternNav and DualVLN.
change.source_note: The source uses \mbox{KuJiaLe} to keep the proper name from splitting at the line edge.

claim_boundary: The accepted edit changes only one Method clause. It does not alter metrics, evidence pools, figures, tables, citations, metadata, or supported/forbidden claim scopes.
residual_risk: The page-5 result.    The official spacing remains intentionally unchanged because three source-level candidates created worse hyphenation or spacing regressions.
